sections.title: How To Guides
sections.subtitle: Step-by-step guides to activating brand purpose, sustainability marketing, and social impact.

items.title: Activating Brand Purpose
items.description: Close the intention-action gap and change consumer behaviour. A practical framework for translating your brand's purpose into measurable action.

items.title: Sustainability Marketing
items.description: Unpack what sustainability marketing is, along with key challenges, proven strategies, and real-world case studies from leading brands.

items.title: Social Impact
items.description: Discover what a social impact agency does, how to choose the right partner, and how to design campaigns that create lasting change.

items.title: Brand Activism
items.description: Learn how to take a meaningful stand on the issues that matter — and how to avoid the pitfalls of performative activism.
